hero_subtitle: SFTY supports institutional compliance teams with role-based access, audit-ready evidence, and scalable workflows to prepare digital asset businesses for secure enterprise deployment.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Complex compliance environments often rely on disconnected systems that hinder secure information sharing and operational governance. This fragmentation delays onboarding, weakens audit trails, and complicates preparation for bank due diligence and institutional deployment requirements.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates identity, transaction, wallet and case data with access controls, audit logs and evidence preservation to create a unified compliance workflow supporting institutional deployment and bank due diligence.
workflow_title: From access policy to audit-ready evidence
workflow_description: SFTY connects role-based permissions, audit logs and evidence integrity into a controlled workflow that supports enterprise compliance and bank due diligence readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another compliance silo. The enterprise trust layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides regulated digital asset businesses with a unified compliance layer that connects providers, preserves evidence, enforces permissions, and supports audit-ready operational control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP compliance teams with controlled provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and deployment governance to meet bank due diligence and enterprise readiness standards.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support enterprise integration readiness
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how SFTY structures role-based access and permissions
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence and decision logs are preserved
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY supports bank due diligence workflows
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects provider outputs into structured workflows, regulatory rules, cases, evidence and reporting to support digital asset compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support case management?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures alerts, provider checks and regulatory events into cases with linked evidence, decision logs, role-based access and escalation workflows for efficient compliance reviews and operations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence with audit logs and version control to support review readiness and institutional governance requirements.
faq_4_question: How does SFTY integrate with existing stacks?
faq_4_answer: SFTY connects existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers without replacing them, integrating data into a connected compliance operating layer with configurable roles and audit logs.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC, Travel Rule or screening providers but turns their outputs into structured reviews, workflows, evidence and reports for regulated workflows.
final_title: Review enterprise integration readiness with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports role-based access, audit trails and scalable compliance workflows for institutional VASP deployments.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
